title: OpenApiSurfaceStableInput
description: Input structure for the openapi_surface_stable predicate.

openapi_spec_path.description: Path to the OpenAPI spec file (JSON or YAML), relative to workspace root.

before_snapshot_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the workspace snapshot before the task.

after_snapshot_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the workspace snapshot after the task.
